tweets.full_text:
The proxy starts running on localhost.
Step 5 — Point Claude Code at localhost
Tell Claude Code to use your local proxy instead of Anthropic’s servers:
export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=any-string-works-here
claude

tweets.full_text:
Step 2 — Clone the project
Open your terminal and run:
git clone https://t.co/UiXWvwOxVA
cd free-claude-code

 Step 3 — Add your API key
Create a .env file in the project folder:
NVIDIA_API_KEY=your_key_here

Step 4 — Install and run the proxy
npm install
npm start

tweets.full_text:
When Claude Code makes an API call — the proxy intercepts it, converts it to NVIDIA NIM format, and sends it to free AI models instead.
Claude Code has no idea anything changed.
It still works exactly the same way you’re used to.
You just stopped paying for it.

What a time to be alive
